
# Eastern Philosophical Traditions

## Chapter Purpose

Explore Vedanta, Buddhist philosophy, non-duality, consciousness as ultimate reality, and Eastern perspectives on mind and existence.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
